series_metadata.series_title: Final Permits to Install, Permits to Operate and Permit Transfers
series_metadata.series_description: Records include Final Permit documents, Director''''''''s Orders, proposed Engineering Drawings, Final Permit Public Notices, Press Releases (if applicable), Final Responsiveness Summaries (if applicable) Stocking Approval (or usage) and PTI close-out letters. Also includes requests for Major Operational Changes (MOCs) for existing PTI or PTO with support documentation, MOC approval letter and final approved MOCs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep five years after expiration unless a licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with the Division. In which case, keep for two years after all administrative, civil, or criminal action is complete then destroy ; Electronic: Keep five years after expiration unless a licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with the Division. In which case, keep for two years after all administrative, civil, or criminal action is complete then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
